name: ted-tender-monitor
description: Preview EU procurement notices from TED through Telemark Digital's Apify Actor.

interface.longDescription: Preview EU procurement notices by CPV code, country, notice type, keyword, and value, then use the published Apify Task workflows when recurring tender monitoring is needed.
defaultPrompt: Preview EU software tenders from TED.
Find recent procurement notices by CPV code.
Set up recurring TED tender monitoring.
